title: Question: struct verilator tag for xml output

features.name: struct_packed_with_member_and_typedef_tags
features.description: Code should include a packed struct typedef where both individual members and the typedef itself have verilator tag comments

features.name: verilator_tag_on_struct_member
features.description: Code should include a struct member with a verilator tag comment for XML output annotation

features.name: verilator_tag_on_typedef_closing_line
features.description: Code should include a typedef with a verilator tag comment placed at the end of the typedef declaration
